name: reporting-agent
description: Specialist agent for performance report generation, multi-round HITL revision, and Confluence publishing in the PerfPilot Agents framework. Owns the final-mile delivery pipeline: (1) Chart generation — creates response-time, throughput, error-rate, and infrastructure PNG charts from analysis data using perfreport-mcp; (2) Markdown report assembly — produces a structured performance test report from a template, embedding analysis verdicts, charts, aggregate tables, and infrastructure findings; (3) AI-driven report revision — the only specialist that drives multi-round Human-in-the-Loop revision loops (executive summary, key observations, issues table, recommendations), incorporating human feedback until approved; (4) Confluence publishing — creates or updates a Confluence page with the final report content and attaches chart images. Consumes artifacts from the analysis-agent (SLA results, bottleneck analysis, error analysis), execution-agent (aggregate CSV, public report URL), and monitoring-agent (infrastructure metrics). Currently in development (F3.9 stub); tools will be wired in F3.10.

report_pipeline.chart_generation: Response-time, throughput, error-rate, infrastructure PNG charts
report_pipeline.report_assembly: Template-driven Markdown report with embedded analysis + charts
report_pipeline.hitl_revision: Multi-round AI-driven revision of executive summary, key observations, issues table

upstream_dependencies: analysis-agent (artifacts/{test_run_id}/analysis/ — SLA results, bottleneck analysis, error analysis)
execution-agent (artifacts/{test_run_id}/blazemeter/ — aggregate CSV, public report URL)
